caption: The video depicts a large group of people, primarily children and some adults, gathered outdoors in what appears to be a rural village setting. The children are dressed in various colorful clothes, and many are standing close together, looking towards the camera. Some adults are holding infants or standing behind the children, possibly supervising them. The background shows simple, modest houses with thatched roofs, surrounded by greenery and trees, indicating a natural, countryside environment. The scene conveys a sense of community and simplicity, with text overlaying the image suggesting a lack of modern technology such as internet and computers in this area. The overall atmosphere is calm and reflective, highlighting the daily life and challenges faced by the community.
